title: Short title
doc_html:
§3017.  Short title

This Part shall be known and cited as the City of Alexandria Employees' Retirement Law.  

Designated from Acts 1948, No. 459, §15 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
